testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that calls GET http://localhost:8899/products/search?q=phone plus each documented filter parameter.
3. Assert every returned item actually matches the predicate (e.g. title/description contains the query) and counts are consistent with `total`.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/validate-search-and-filter-queries/cases.json — this run recorded 0 of 7 checks failing.
